common.tagline: Premium HDPE Netting Solutions for Global Construction

hero.title: Industrial-Grade HDPE Netting Solutions
hero.subtitle: Leading manufacturer of construction mesh, dust cover nets, shade nets, and more for projects worldwide.

products.title: Our Product Range
products.subtitle: Comprehensive netting solutions engineered for durability, UV resistance, and performance in demanding environments.

quality.title: Premium Quality Materials
quality.description: 100% virgin HDPE resin with UV stabilizers for maximum durability and longevity.

manufacturing.title: Advanced Manufacturing
manufacturing.description: State-of-the-art production lines ensuring consistent quality and precise specifications.

customization.title: Custom Solutions
customization.description: Tailored sizes, colors, and specifications to meet your exact project requirements.

certification.title: International Certification
certification.description: ISO certified with products meeting CE, SGS, and global quality standards.

about.title: About Our Company
about.description: With over 15 years of experience in HDPE netting manufacturing, we have established ourselves as a trusted global supplier for construction, agriculture, and industrial applications.
